parameters.reasoning_layer: L1 with sharper attention temp=0.7 and plan vector generation
parameters.validation_layer: L9 with softer attention temp=1.3 and SolarShield gating
parameters.SolarShield_gating: reality-locked gating at L0/L4 balancing residual stream flow

other_params.description: Polar Express Newton-Schulz coefficients plus variance reduction on Muon updates

parameters.usage: smoothed weights for evaluation, raw weights for training

parameters.name: Tight SWA
parameters.description: SWA checkpoint collection restricted to scale<0.2 (last ~600 steps), every 50 steps, eliminating SWA quality penalty while maintaining quantization-friendly weight averaging.

compression.method: Entropy-coded compression (Huffman + LZMA fallback to plain LZMA)

evaluation_technique.method: Sliding window with legal score-first TTT protocol

parameters.training_batch_prefetch: Background thread builds next pinned CPU batch while GPU runs current step
parameters.h2d_copy_stream: Optional dedicated CUDA copy stream with pinned memory and wait_stream synchronization
parameters.validation_prefetch: Prefetch thread for pinned CPU batches with double-buffered H2D using copy stream and events

default_env_vars.TRAINING_TIMING_BREAKDOWN: off by default, disables prefetch/overlap when on

parameters.val_bytecount_device: cpu by default, can be set to cuda to mirror baseline GPU byte math

parameters.adapted_layers: Q, V projections and LM head

lr_schedule.method: cosine decay with linear warmup and warmdown
